channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Harvist road, 29th May
item.description:
Chair dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Junction of Laurier rd and Dartmouth park avenue, 29th May
item.description:
Missing sign! Although the sink hole has been fenced off and road closure sign erected, cars are travelling up Laurier rd before seeing the obstruction and meaning they gave to do a 3 point turn to get Back, causing traffic problems. Please could you install a road closed sign at the junction of Laurier and York rise. Thankyou.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laurier Road, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spraypaint on shopfront., 29th May
item.description:
Someone has spraypainted the front of my shop on Hoxton street last night.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoxton Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tents and a mattress appeared under the passing at Abbey Wood. Lady time it srmtarted like this, it ended up being a full camp and a health hazard, requiring deep sanitation and Police involvement., 29th May
item.description:
2 tents and a mattress appeared unde the passing. Trying to be conscious that there may be harmless honeless persons, but last time someone settled there, it turned into a drug den and required deep sanitation and a public risk to everyone that passed. The fences have been unhinged for access.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harrow Manorway, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish not collected, 29th May
item.description:
This is the 2nd time in a row where the black bin wasn’t collected by Greenwich council
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Little Heath, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Duchy Street Pavement falling apart, 29th May
item.description:
Pavements along Duchy Street, Aquinas Street and Coin street all need desperately re-surfacing / digging up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Aquinas Street, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing road sign Lebanon street SE17 2GQ, 29th May
item.description:
Corner of Dawes Street turning into Lebanon street SE17 2GQ the street name has gone.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Merrow Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed glass bottle in children’s playground, 29th May
item.description:
Smashed glass Smirnoff bottle in playground. Most glass on rubberised ‘pond’ feature but scattered towards climbing frame. Hazard to little children and those wearing sandals.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Gravel Road, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Outside cafe

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, Hackney, London

item.title: A board on pavement, 29th May
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 29th May
item.description:
Fly tipping up road from 112-118, trip hazards across pavement and a variety of items. Can something be done about the fly tipping on lower palace road? It is repetitive.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes blocking emergency access and car charging bay, 29th May
item.description:
8-10

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6-16, Hemsworth Street, Hoxton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poo bags in the park, 29th May
item.description:
Dog poo bags left in the park, South of the play area towards the houses, just noticed today

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxhawth Crescent, Petts Wood, Greater London

item.title: A board on pavement, 29th May

item.title: Glass in the park, 29th May
item.description:
There is all glass on the floor in the park also glass in the skate park my daughter went up the ramp grabbed the side wohh th out knowing it was full of glass at the top
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Radial Path, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - smashed glass or panels / jagged metal edges on shelter

item.title: Four dead trees and two that need water, 29th May
